title: W.I.T.L
description:
Stands for: "Where Is That Lodestone".

A small client-side mod which turns Lodestone Compasses into Markers in your world for you to see!
body:
# W.I.T.L (Where Is That Lodestone)
A simple client-side Vanilla+ mod which lets you save Waypoint Markers by using a lodestone and a compass. 

Once a marker has been made, renaming the compass will change the display name of the marker.

## Compatibility
So far this mod only works directly with [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap), not World Map. I may possibly increase this list of compatibility in the future.

So far I have not found any conflicts, but please if you do, send them as an issue [here](https://github.com/saturn-volv/WITL/issues)!

## Disclaimer!
This mod is still a **WORK IN PROGRESS** and in such, all displays of the markers is not final and subject to change. The plan for markers is to have them change icon dependent on what the item's name is, so changing the name changes the marker icon.
